channel.title: Change Streams on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Change Streams on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Change streams (multi-shard) in Azure DocumentDB
item.description:
Azure DocumentDB change streams are now in public preview with multi-node support. The feature lets you capture live data changes using controlled polling for real-time, event-driven applications.

  • Source: Azure Updates
